title: Executive Order 8078—Amending the Foreign Service Regulations of the United States

flags.justification: A narrow, technical amendment to a fee schedule under existing statutory authority.
A clear, specific amendment with exact fee amounts.
Multiple minor fee-schedule items, all coherently amending one fee tariff.
A fee-schedule amendment, not a compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.
A standing, periodically-revised fee schedule, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, technical fee-schedule amendment.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
